channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAEL → IRANIAN : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Natanz, Esfahan, Iran)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: ISRAEL / IRANIAN. Location: Natanz, Esfahan, Iran. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 3 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAEL → nan : Engage in ethnic cleansing (Gaza, Israel (general), Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Engage in ethnic cleansing. Actors: ISRAEL / nan. Location: Gaza, Israel (general), Israel. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 3 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] COLLEGE → nan : Use unconventional violence, not specified below (Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use unconventional violence, not specified below. Actors: COLLEGE / nan. Location: Israel. Goldstein Scale: -9.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.title: [美伊对峙] LEBANON → THE US : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Iran)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: LEBANON / THE US. Location: Iran. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.title: [美伊对峙] IRAN → MILITARY BASE : Use conventional military force, not specified below (White House, District of Columbia, United States)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: IRAN / MILITARY BASE. Location: White House, District of Columbia, United States. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 7 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Demonstrate or rally. Actors: REBEL / REGIME. Location: Tehran, Tehran, Iran. Goldstein Scale: -6.5. Mentioned in 5 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: CITIZEN / NEBRASKA. Location: Ukraine. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 6 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with small arms and light weapons. Actors: DEMONSTRATOR / GOVERNMENT. Location: Sebastopol, Sevastopol', Misto, Ukraine. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 6 sources.
